response.overview: Mateusz Socha's "Panie Mateuszu" (which translates to "Mr. Mateusz") is one of the most successful and acclaimed stand-up comedy specials by the popular Polish comedian. Known for his dynamic stage presence, he uses highly detailed storytelling filled with expressive tangents to bring personal anecdotes and everyday observations to life.
response.title: Mateusz Socha: Panie Mateuszu
